plants.name: Monstera Deliciosa
plants.description: Architectural leaves and a sculptural silhouette make this a signature plant for modern interiors.

care.light: Thrives in bright, indirect light with gentle morning sun.
care.watering: Water when the top inch of soil feels dry, then drain thoroughly.
care.commonIssues: Wipe leaves monthly, rotate weekly, and watch for drooping caused by inconsistent watering.

plants.name: Indoor Olive Tree
plants.description: A refined, silvery-green tree that brings warmth and height to calm, sunlit rooms.

care.light: Needs a bright spot with several hours of direct sun.
care.watering: Allow the soil to dry slightly between waterings.
care.commonIssues: Yellowing leaves often point to overwatering or too little direct sun.

plants.name: Calathea Orbifolia
plants.description: Broad patterned foliage with soft silver bands for a lush, gallery-like feel.

care.light: Prefers medium to bright indirect light.
care.watering: Keep soil lightly moist and use filtered water when possible.
care.commonIssues: Brown edges can appear if the air is too dry or the water quality is harsh.

plants.name: Ficus Altissima
plants.description: Variegated leaves and an airy shape designed to anchor a room with understated drama.

care.light: Bright filtered light keeps the variegation crisp.
care.watering: Water when the upper layer of soil dries out.
care.commonIssues: Leaf drop is common after sudden moves, drafts, or irregular watering.

plants.name: Bird of Paradise
plants.description: Bird of Paradise is styled for calm, premium interiors with a sculptural profile and layered foliage presence.

care.light: Thrives in bright, indirect light with a little room to breathe.
care.watering: Water when the top layer of soil dries out, then drain fully.
care.commonIssues: Rotate weekly and avoid cold drafts to keep growth balanced.

plants.name: Rubber Plant Burgundy
plants.description: Rubber Plant Burgundy is styled for calm, premium interiors with a sculptural profile and layered foliage presence.

care.light: Prefers medium to bright filtered light and a consistent spot.

care.commonIssues: Brown edges usually mean the air is dry or watering has been inconsistent.

plants.description: ZZ Plant Raven is styled for calm, premium interiors with a sculptural profile and layered foliage presence.

care.light: Handles lower light well but appreciates a bright room.

plants.description: Pothos Marble Queen is styled for calm, premium interiors with a sculptural profile and layered foliage presence.

care.light: Bright light keeps the foliage color and shape at its best.
